steps.title: Place the year phrase
steps.content: The first clause makes a general claim about constitutions. The next clause gives Poland's constitution as a specific example, and the phrase enacted in 1997 should introduce that example. The blank must separate the two clauses and attach the year phrase to Poland's constitution.

steps.title: Check modifier placement
steps.content: Choice A makes enacted in 1997 restrict constitutions generally. Choice B still attaches the year phrase to constitutions and uses awkward punctuation before the semicolon. Choice C attaches the year phrase to constitutions and leaves the clauses split only by commas. The answer is D.
